introSection:
Lightspeed is a steel roller coaster located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey. It is the second generation of Intamin's 10-Inversion coaster.

This roller coaster was erected in 2014 and has been operational since, but it has not been open to the general public until March 20, 2019, when the park opened.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Yellow track with green supports. Lighstpeed Roller Coaster has two tunnels, located before and after the cobra roll.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Photograph of the train on Facebook

fullText:
Lightspeed is a steel roller coaster located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey. It is the second generation of Intamin's 10-Inversion coaster.

This roller coaster was erected in 2014 and has been operational since, but it has not been open to the general public until March 20, 2019, when the park opened.

Yellow track with green supports. Lighstpeed Roller Coaster has two tunnels, located before and after the cobra roll.




 * Photograph of the train on Facebook
